TABLE.NAME: local_latepenalty_rules
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores late penalty configuration rules for course modules

FIELD.NAME: enabled
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the penalty rule is enabled (0=disabled, 1=enabled)

FIELD.NAME: recalc_on_deadline
FIELD.COMMENT: Recalculate applied penalties when the activity deadline changes (1=yes, 0=no)

FIELD.NAME: recalc_on_rate
FIELD.COMMENT: Recalculate applied penalties when the daily rate or maximum cap changes (1=yes, 0=no)

FIELD.NAME: last_deadline
FIELD.COMMENT: Snapshot of the resolved deadline at the time the rule was last saved, used to detect deadline changes

TABLE.NAME: local_latepenalty_overrides
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-user overrides for late penalty rules

FIELD.NAME: deadline
FIELD.COMMENT: Custom deadline timestamp; null = inherit from activity

FIELD.NAME: daily_penalty
FIELD.COMMENT: Custom daily penalty percentage; null = inherit from rule

FIELD.NAME: max_penalty
FIELD.COMMENT: Custom maximum penalty percentage; null = inherit from rule
